name: IMA Seedance 2.0 Video Generator
tagline: Seedance 2.0 video generator for text-to-video, image-to-video, first-last-frame, and reference media workflows.
description: Seedance 2.0 AI video generator with two models: Seedance 2.0 (`ima-pro`) for quality-first output and Seedance 2.0 Fast (`ima-pro-fast`) for faster iteration. Supports text-to-video, image-to-video, first-last-frame, and reference-media video generation with image, video, and audio references. Designed for cinematic prompts, storyboard-driven clips, consistent-character workflows, product demos, and short-form content generation.
credentialNotice: The IMA API key is required at runtime (--api-key or IMA_API_KEY). It is sent to api.imastudio.com for product/task/compliance APIs and, for local/non-HTTPS media inputs, to imapi.liveme.com for upload-token flow. User-provided remote media URLs may also be fetched directly for validation/probing, but the API key is not sent to those URLs. Obtain keys at https://www.imaclaw.ai/. Use a scoped/test key for initial testing.

requires.credentialNote: IMA_API_KEY is required at runtime. It is sent to api.imastudio.com and, for local/non-HTTPS media uploads, to imapi.liveme.com.

localPaths.purpose: Preferences (model defaults) and generation logs; logs auto-cleaned after 7 days.

persistence.retention: Logs are auto-cleaned after 7 days; preferences remain until user deletes them.

use_cases: Text-to-video with Seedance 2.0 cinema-grade quality or Seedance 2.0 Fast rapid prototyping
Image-to-video animation with high frame-rate temporal consistency
First-last frame transition video with smooth interpolation
Reference-image style video for character consistency across multi-shot production
Cinematic video generator workflows with camera-led prompts and motion direction
Storyboard to video creation from scene plans, beat sheets, and shot lists
AI short film generator workflows for stylized narrative clips and multi-shot sequences
AI commercial video generator and AI ad video generator production for branded campaigns
AI music video generator concepting and AI short clip generator ideation
Product demos, brand advertising, and promotional content
Social media clips for TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts
Character animation with visual consistency via reference images
Batch style exploration and A/B testing with Seedance 2.0 Fast
AI product video generator workflows for launches, demos, and explainers
key_features: Two Seedance 2.0 models: quality-first (ima-pro, 300-900s) and speed-first (ima-pro-fast, 120-600s)
High frame-rate temporal consistency — smooth motion, no flickering
Precise camera language control: push, pull, pan, tilt, track, crane
Multimodal input: text, image, first+last frame, reference image, reference video, and reference audio
Configurable aspect ratios (16:9, 9:16, 1:1, 4:3, 3:4, 21:9, adaptive) and resolution (480P, 720P)
Supports cinematic video generator, storyboard to video, and consistent character video workflows
